시편 111:1.content: Praise Yah! I will give thanks to Yahweh with my whole heart, in the council of the upright, and in the congregation.

시편 111:2.content: Yahweh’s works are great, pondered by all those who delight in them.

시편 111:3.content: His work is honor and majesty. His righteousness endures forever.

시편 111:4.content: He has caused his wonderful works to be remembered. Yahweh is gracious and merciful.

시편 111:5.content: He has given food to those who fear him. He always remembers his covenant.

시편 111:6.content: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the heritage of the nations.

시편 111:7.content: The works of his hands are truth and justice. All his precepts are sure.

시편 111:8.content: They are established forever and ever. They are done in truth and uprightness.

시편 111:9.content: He has sent redemption to his people. He has ordained his covenant forever. His name is holy and awesome!

시편 111:10.content: The fear of Yahweh is the beginning of wisdom. All those who do his work have a good understanding. His praise endures forever!
